channel.title: Progression on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Progression on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Arcanum Experience Points
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the Arcanum experience point system, the design behind it and how it’s kind of contentious.

item.title: Skill Trees
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about skill trees.

item.title: The Million XP Dungeon
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the million experience Point dungeon, or, based on how I’m dressed, this could also be called The Old Man and the C++- C++.

item.title: Grind
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about grind specifically.

item.title: Skill-based XP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about skill-based XP.

item.title: How To Give Experience Points
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about how to give XP experience points.

item.title: Enemy Progression
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about enemy progression.

item.title: Level Caps
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about level caps and this is a question from my industry buddy, Matt Pritchard, and he basically wanted me to talk about level caps versus having infinite advancement in an RPG.

item.title: Experience & Level Progression
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about leveling and progression, and this is actually me answering a question from — and I hope I’m pronouncing this user’s name right — stavrus nicolao.
